summary: Recent updates to the WebVTT (Web Video Text Tracks) captions system focused on improving how captions are displayed on video. By switching from using `innerHTML` to `setHTML`, the Firefox browser enhances security and performance for rendering text content in captions. This change ensures that captions not only load more efficiently but also reduces the risk of potential vulnerabilities associated with HTML injection. As a result, users can expect a smoother and safer experience when viewing video content with captions.
